# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download (S3, Artifactory, HTTP). Example: https://artifactory.example.com/releases/app-1.0.jar,s3://my-bucket/builds/config.zip'
        )
        string(
            name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Comma-separated list of production server hostnames/IPs. Example: prod-server-1.example.com,prod-server-2.example.com'
        )
        string(
            name: 'DEPLOY_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/app/deploy',
            description: 'Target deployment directory on production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'prod-ssh-credentials',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for SSH access to production servers'
        )
        string(
            name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'aws-credentials',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for AWS access (required for S3 URLs)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'artifactory-credentials',
            description: 'Jenkins credentials ID for Artifactory access (if needed)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SERVICE_NAME',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Name of the service to restart after deployment (leave empty to skip restart)'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_STRATEGY',
            choices: ['rolling', 'parallel', 'canary'],
            description: 'Deployment strategy: rolling (one by one), parallel (all at once), canary (first server only, then rest after confirmation)'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Backup existing artifacts on production servers before deployment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run health check after deployment'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/health',
            description: 'Health check URL path (appended to server address)'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_PORT',
            defaultValue: '8080',
            description: 'Health check port'
        )
        string(
            name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT',
            defaultValue: '120',
            description: 'Health check timeout in seconds'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Perform a dry run without actually deploying'
        )
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACTS_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        CHECKSUM_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/checksums"
        DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: 'date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S', returnStdout: true).trim()
        BACKUP_DIR_NAME = "backup_${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========================================="
                    echo "  Artifact Deployment Pipeline"
                    echo "========================================="
                    echo "Deploy Timestamp: ${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}"
                    echo "Deploy Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}"
                    echo "Dry Run: ${params.DRY_RUN}"

                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required. Please provide at least one artifact URL.")
                    }

                    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error("PRODUCTION_SERVERS parameter is required. Please provide at least one production server.")
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.trim()
                    env.SERVER_LIST = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.trim()

                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    echo "Artifacts to download (${urls.size()}):"
                    urls.eachWithIndex { url, idx ->
                        echo "  ${idx + 1}. ${url}"
                    }

                    echo "Target servers (${servers.size()}):"
                    servers.eachWithIndex { server, idx ->
                        echo "  ${idx + 1}. ${server}"
                    }

                    echo "Deploy path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                    echo "Service name: ${params.SERVICE_NAME ?: 'N/A (no restart)'}"
                    echo "Backup existing: ${params.BACKUP_EXISTING}"
                    echo "Health check: ${params.HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED}"

                    // Validate URLs
                    urls.each { url ->
                        if (!url.startsWith('http://') && !url.startsWith('https://') && !url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                            error("Invalid URL format: ${url}. Supported protocols: http, https, s3")
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh """
                        rm -rf ${ARTIFACTS_DIR} ${CHECKSUM_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                        mkdir -p ${CHECKSUM_DIR}
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.ARTIFACT_URL_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def downloadResults = [:]

                    for (int i = 0; i < urls.size(); i++) {
                        def url = urls[i]
                        def fileName = extractFileName(url)
                        def artifactPath = "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${fileName}"

                        echo "----------------------------------------"
                        echo "Downloading artifact ${i + 1}/${urls.size()}: ${fileName}"
                        echo "Source: ${url}"
                        echo "----------------------------------------"

                        try {
                            if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
                                downloadFromS3(url, artifactPath)
                            } else if (url.contains('artifactory') || url.contains('jfrog')) {
                                downloadFromArtifactory(url, artifactPath)
                            } else {
                                downloadFromHTTP(url, artifactPath)
                            }

                            // Generate checksum
                            def checksum = sh(
                                script: "sha256sum ${artifactPath} | awk '{print \$1}'",
                                returnStdout: true
                            ).trim()

                            sh "echo '${checksum}  ${fileName}' > ${CHECKSUM_DIR}/${fileName}.sha256"

                            def fileSize = sh(
                                script: "stat -c%s ${artifactPath} 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z ${artifactPath} 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'",
                                returnStdout: true
                            ).trim()

                            echo "✓ Downloaded: ${fileName} (Size: ${formatFileSize(fileSize)}, SHA256: ${checksum})"
                            downloadResults[fileName] = [status: 'SUCCESS', checksum: checksum, size: fileSize]
                        } catch (Exception e) {
                            echo "✗ Failed to download: ${fileName} - ${e.message}"
                            downloadResults[fileName] = [status: 'FAILED', error: e.message]
                            error("Failed to download artifact: ${url}")
                        }
                    }

                    // Summary
                    echo "\n========== Download Summary =========="
                    downloadResults.each { name, result ->
                        echo "${result.status == 'SUCCESS' ? '✓' : '✗'} ${name}: ${result.status}"
                    }
                    echo "======================================\n"

                    // List all downloaded artifacts
                    sh "ls -lah ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Verify Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Verifying downloaded artifacts..."

                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }

                    if (artifactFiles.isEmpty()) {
                        error("No artifacts found in download directory!")
                    }

                    artifactFiles.each { fileName ->
                        def filePath = "${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${fileName}"

                        // Verify file is not empty
                        def fileSize = sh(
                            script: "stat -c%s ${filePath} 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z ${filePath} 2>/dev/null",
                            returnStdout: true
                        ).trim()

                        if (fileSize == '0') {
                            error("Artifact ${fileName} is empty (0 bytes)!")
                        }

                        // Verify checksum
                        sh """
                            cd ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}
                            sha256sum -c ${CHECKSUM_DIR}/${fileName}.sha256
                        """

                        echo "✓ Verified: ${fileName} (${formatFileSize(fileSize)})"

                        // Detect and validate archive types
                        if (fileName.endsWith('.jar')) {
                            sh "file ${filePath} | grep -i 'zip\\|java' || echo 'Warning: JAR file may be corrupt'"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.zip')) {
                            sh "file ${filePath} | grep -i 'zip' || echo 'Warning: ZIP file may be corrupt'"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.tar.gz') || fileName.endsWith('.tgz')) {
                            sh "file ${filePath} | grep -i 'gzip' || echo 'Warning: tar.gz file may be corrupt'"
                        } else if (fileName.endsWith('.war')) {
                            sh "file ${filePath} | grep -i 'zip\\|java' || echo 'Warning: WAR file may be corrupt'"
                        }
                    }

                    echo "All artifacts verified successfully."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Pre-Deployment Confirmation') {
            when {
                expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }

                    def confirmMsg = """
                    ==========================================
                    PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT CONFIRMATION
                    ==========================================
                    
                    Artifacts (${artifactFiles.size()}):
                    ${artifactFiles.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                    
                    Target Servers (${servers.size()}):
                    ${servers.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                    
                    Deploy Path: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                    Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}
                    Service: ${params.SERVICE_NAME ?: 'N/A'}
                    Backup: ${params.BACKUP_EXISTING}
                    
                    ==========================================
                    Do you want to proceed with deployment?
                    ==========================================
                    """.stripIndent()

                    input(
                        message: confirmMsg,
                        ok: 'Deploy to Production'
                    )
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }

                    switch (params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY) {
                        case 'rolling':
                            deployRolling(servers)
                            break
                        case 'parallel':
                            deployParallel(servers)
                            break
                        case 'canary':
                            deployCanary(servers)
                            break
                        default:
                            error("Unknown deploy strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}")
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Dry Run Summary') {
            when {
                expression { params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def artifactFiles = sh(
                        script: "ls ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/",
                        returnStdout: true
                    ).trim().split('\n').findAll { it }

                    echo """
                    ==========================================
                    DRY RUN SUMMARY
                    ==========================================
                    
                    The following actions WOULD be performed:
                    
                    1. Upload ${artifactFiles.size()} artifact(s) to ${servers.size()} server(s)
                    2. Deploy to: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                    3. Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}
                    ${params.BACKUP_EXISTING ? '4. Backup existing files to: ' + params.DEPLOY_PATH + '/' + BACKUP_DIR_NAME : '4. No backup'}
                    ${params.SERVICE_NAME ? '5. Restart service: ' + params.SERVICE_NAME : '5. No service restart'}
                    ${params.HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED ? '6. Health check on port ' + params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT + params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH : '6. No health check'}
                    
                    Artifacts:
                    ${artifactFiles.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                    
                    Servers:
                    ${servers.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
                    
                    ==========================================
                    No changes were made (DRY RUN mode)
                    ==========================================
                    """.stripIndent()
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deployment Verification') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { !params.DRY_RUN }
                    expression { params.HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = env.SERVER_LIST.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    def allHealthy = true
                    def healthResults = [:]

                    servers.each { server ->
                        echo "Running final health verification for ${server}..."
                        def healthy = performHealthCheck(server)
                        healthResults[server] = healthy
                        if (!healthy) {
                            allHealthy = false
                        }
                    }

                    echo "\n========== Health Check Summary =========="
                    healthResults.each { server, healthy ->
                        echo "${healthy ? '✓' : '✗'} ${server}: ${healthy ? 'HEALTHY' : 'UNHEALTHY'}"
                    }
                    echo "==========================================\n"

                    if (!allHealthy) {
                        def unhealthyServers = healthResults.findAll { !it.value }.collect { it.key }
                        error("Deployment verification failed! Unhealthy servers: ${unhealthyServers.join(', ')}")
                    }

                    echo "All servers are healthy. Deployment verified successfully!"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo """
                ==========================================
                ✓ DEPLOYMENT ${params.DRY_RUN ? '(DRY RUN) ' : ''}COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY
                ==========================================
                Timestamp: ${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}
                Strategy: ${params.DEPLOY_STRATEGY}
                Build: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
                ==========================================
                """.stripIndent()
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo """
                ==========================================
                ✗ DEPLOYMENT FAILED
                ==========================================
                Timestamp: ${DEPLOY_TIMESTAMP}
                Build: ${env.BUILD_NUMBER}
                Please check logs and consider rollback.
                ==========================================
                """.stripIndent()

                if (!params.DRY_RUN && params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
                    echo "Backups are available at: ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${BACKUP_DIR_NAME}"
                    echo "To rollback, restore from the backup directory on each server."
                }
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                // Archive artifacts info for reference
                sh """
                    if [ -d "${CHECKSUM_DIR}" ]; then
                        cat ${CHECKSUM_DIR}/*.sha256 > ${WORKSPACE}/deployment_checksums.txt 2>/dev/null || true
                    fi
                """
                archiveArtifacts artifacts: 'deployment_checksums.txt', allowEmptyArchive: true
            }
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, patterns: [
                [pattern: 'artifacts/**', type: 'INCLUDE'],
                [pattern: 'checksums/**', type: 'INCLUDE']
            ])
        }
    }
}

// ==================== Helper Functions ====================

def extractFileName(String url) {
    def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
    // Remove query parameters if present
    if (fileName.contains('?')) {
        fileName = fileName.split('\\?')[0]
    }
    return fileName
}

def formatFileSize(String sizeStr) {
    try {
        def size = sizeStr.toLong()
        if (size >= 1073741824) {
            return String.format("%.2f GB", size / 1073741824.0)
        } else if (size >= 1048576) {
            return String.format("%.2f MB", size / 1048576.0)
        } else if (size >= 1024) {
            return String.format("%.2f KB", size / 1024.0)
        } else {
            return "${size} bytes"
        }
    } catch (Exception e) {
        return sizeStr
    }
}

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String targetPath) {
    withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding',
                      credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                      accessKeyVariable: 'AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID',
                      secretKeyVariable: 'AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY']]) {
        sh """
            aws s3 cp '${s3Url}' '${targetPath}' --no-progress
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String targetPath) {
    withCredentials([usernamePassword(
        credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
        usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
        passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD')]) {
        sh """
            curl -fsSL \
                -u "\${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASSWORD}" \
                -o '${targetPath}' \
                '${url}'
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromHTTP(String url, String targetPath) {
    sh """
        curl -fsSL \
            --retry 3 \
            --retry-delay 5 \
            --connect-timeout 30 \
            --max-time 600 \
            -o '${targetPath}' \
            '${url}'
    """
}

def deployToServer(String server) {
    echo "========================================="
    echo "Deploying to server: ${server}"
    echo "========================================="

    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        // Test SSH connectivity
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ${server} 'echo "SSH connection successful"'
        """

        // Create deploy directory if it doesn't exist
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} 'mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'
        """

        // Backup existing artifacts if enabled
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            echo "Creating backup on ${server}..."
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                    BACKUP_PATH="${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/${BACKUP_DIR_NAME}"
                    mkdir -p "\${BACKUP_PATH}"
                    if [ "\$(ls -A ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v backup_)" ]; then
                        cd ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                        for f in \$(ls -1 | grep -v backup_); do
                            cp -r "\$f" "\${BACKUP_PATH}/" 2>/dev/null || true
                        done
                        echo "Backup created at: \${BACKUP_PATH}"
                    else
                        echo "No existing files to backup"
                    fi
                '
            """
        }

        // Upload artifacts
        echo "Uploading artifacts to ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/* ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
        """

        // Upload checksums
        sh """
            scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${CHECKSUM_DIR}/*.sha256 ${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
        """

        // Verify checksums on remote server
        echo "Verifying checksums on ${server}..."
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                cd ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}
                VERIFY_FAILED=0
                for checksum_file in *.sha256; do
                    if [ -f "\${checksum_file}" ]; then
                        if sha256sum -c "\${checksum_file}"; then
                            echo "✓ Checksum verified: \${checksum_file}"
                        else
                            echo "✗ Checksum FAILED: \${checksum_file}"
                            VERIFY_FAILED=1
                        fi
                    fi
                done
                
                # Clean up checksum files
                rm -f *.sha256
                
                if [ \${VERIFY_FAILED} -eq 1 ]; then
                    echo "ERROR: Checksum verification failed!"
                    exit 1
                fi
            '
        """

        // Set permissions
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                chmod -R 755 ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                echo "Permissions set on ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/"
                ls -la ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
            '
        """

        // Restart service if specified
        if (params.SERVICE_NAME?.trim()) {
            echo "Restarting service '${params.SERVICE_NAME}' on ${server}..."
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${server} '
                    if command -v systemctl &> /dev/null; then
                        sudo systemctl restart ${params.SERVICE_NAME}
                        sleep 5
                        sudo systemctl status ${params.SERVICE_NAME} --no-pager
                    elif command -v service &> /dev/null; then
                        sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} restart
                        sleep 5
                        sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} status
                    else
                        echo "WARNING: Neither systemctl nor service command found. Please restart manually."
                    fi
                '
            """
        }
    }

    // Health check
    if (params.HEALTH_CHECK_ENABLED) {
        echo "Running health check for ${server}..."
        def healthy = performHealthCheck(server)
        if (!healthy) {
            error("Health check failed for server: ${server}")
        }
        echo "✓ Health check passed for ${server}"
    }

    echo "✓ Deployment to ${server} completed successfully"
}

def performHealthCheck(String server) {
    def timeout = params.HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT.toInteger()
    def healthUrl = "http://${server}:${params.HEALTH_CHECK_PORT}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL_PATH}"
    def startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
    def healthy = false

    echo "Health check URL: ${healthUrl}"
    echo "Timeout: ${timeout} seconds"

    while (!healthy && (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) < (timeout * 1000)) {
        try {
            def result = sh(
                script: """
                    curl -sf --connect-timeout 5 --max-time 10 \
                        -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' \
                        '${healthUrl}' 2>/dev/null || echo '000'
                """,
                returnStdout: true
            ).trim()

            if (result == '200' || result == '204') {
                healthy = true
                echo "✓ Health check passed (HTTP ${result})"
            } else {
                echo "Health check returned HTTP ${result}, retrying..."
                sleep(5)
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "Health check attempt failed: ${e.message}, retrying..."
            sleep(5)
        }
    }

    if (!healthy) {
        echo "✗ Health check failed for ${server} after ${timeout} seconds"
    }

    return healthy
}

def deployRolling(List<String> servers) {
    echo "========================================="
    echo "Starting ROLLING deployment"
    echo "========================================="

    for (int i = 0; i < servers.size(); i++) {
        def server = servers[i]
        echo "\n--- Deploying to server ${i + 1}/${servers.size()}: ${server} ---"

        try {
            deployToServer(server)
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "Deployment failed for ${server}: ${e.message}"
            if (i > 0) {
                echo "WARNING: ${i} server(s) already deployed. Consider rollback for consistency."
            }
            error("Rolling deployment halted at server ${server}")
        }
    }

    echo "✓ Rolling deployment completed for all ${servers.size()} servers"
}

def deployParallel(List<String> servers) {
    echo "========================================="
    echo "Starting PARALLEL deployment"
    echo "========================================="

    def deployStages = [:]

    servers.each { server ->
        def serverName = server
        deployStages["Deploy to ${serverName}"] = {
            deployToServer(serverName)
        }
    }

    parallel deployStages

    echo "✓ Parallel deployment completed for all ${servers.size()} servers"
}

def deployCanary(List<String> servers) {
    echo "========================================="
    echo "Starting CANARY deployment"
    echo "========================================="

    if (servers.size() < 2) {
        echo "Only one server specified, deploying directly..."
        deployToServer(servers[0])
        return
    }

    def canaryServer = servers[0]
    def remainingServers = servers.subList(1, servers.size())

    echo "--- Phase 1: Canary deployment to ${canaryServer} ---"
    deployToServer(canaryServer)

    echo "Canary deployment successful on ${canaryServer}"

    // Wait for confirmation to continue
    input(
        message: """
        Canary deployment to ${canaryServer} was successful.
        
        Remaining servers (${remainingServers.size()}):
        ${remainingServers.collect { "  - ${it}" }.join('\n')}
        
        Do you want to proceed with deploying to the remaining servers?
        """.stripIndent(),
        ok: 'Proceed with Full Deployment'
    )

    echo "--- Phase 2: Deploying to remaining ${remainingServers.size()} servers ---"

    for (int i = 0; i < remainingServers.size(); i++) {
        def server = remainingServers[i]
        echo "\n--- Deploying to server ${i + 2}/${servers.size()}: ${server} ---"
        deployToServer(server)
    }

    echo "✓ Canary deployment completed for all ${servers.size()} servers"
}
